// src/lib.rs
fn process_data(data: &[u8]) -> Vec<u8> {
    data.iter().copied().filter(|b| *b != 0).collect()
}

// tests/integration.rs (dev-only)
#[test]
fn test_with_tempfile() {
    let tmp = tempfile::NamedTempFile::new().unwrap();
    std::fs::write(tmp.path(), b"test data").unwrap();
    let result = process_data(b"test data");
    assert!(!result.is_empty());
}
